summary: Official Payslip feature fully tested. All 7 features verified: GET /api/payslip/{batch_id}/{worker_id} returns complete payslip data, Payroll tab shows 'ФИШОВЕ ЗА ЗАПЛАТИ' section with 'Фиш' buttons, PayslipDialog displays full content, Employee dossier payroll-weeks tab has 'Фиш' buttons, Legacy payroll sidebar renamed to 'Фишове (стар)'. No regressions on batch creation, payment, allocation.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing paid batch c3ed7745-af58-46d7-8f58-28c81b19d7ff and worker Светлин Антонов (6f69367a-e25f-489d-a7c8-f25cde6a9ac5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Official Payslip feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/payslip/{batch_id}/{worker_id} returns complete payslip with worker info, summary (days/hours/normal/overtime/gross/net), by_day, by_project, by_smr, allocations. 2) Payroll tab (All Reports → Заплати) shows 'ФИШОВЕ ЗА ЗАПЛАТИ' section for paid batches with 'Фиш' button per worker. 3) PayslipDialog (data-testid='payslip-dialog') shows worker header, 6-card summary (data-testid='payslip-summary'), by_day table, by_project list, final calculation, paid_at. 4) Employee dossier payroll-weeks tab has 'Фиш' button (data-testid='payslip-btn-{batch_id}') per week. 5) Sidebar legacy payroll renamed to 'Фишове (стар)' (nav.payrollLegacy i18n key). 6) Test payslip: Светлин Антонов in batch c3ed7745 shows 1 day, 8h, 129.52 EUR gross/net, Къща_Миро project, paid 2026-04-11.

GET /api/payslip/{batch_id}/{worker_id}: Contains summary (included_days, total_hours, normal_hours, overtime_hours, gross, net)
Contains by_day breakdown with date, hours, normal, overtime, entries
Contains by_project breakdown with project_name, hours, value
Contains batch info (batch_id, worker_id, week_start, week_end, batch_status, paid_at)

payroll_tab: Заплати tab accessible from All Reports page
'ФИШОВЕ ЗА ЗАПЛАТИ' section visible for paid batches
'Фиш' button per worker in paid batch
payslip_dialog: Worker header with avatar, name, position, pay_type, hourly_rate
6-card summary (Дни, Часове, Норм., Извънр., Брутно, Нетто)
By day table with date, hours, normal, overtime, details
By project list with project_name, hours, value

i18n: payslip namespace exists with all required keys
